title: The Rattlesnake
overview: A filmmaker is commissioned to film a documentary on the social reality of the Lacandon people in the state of Chiapas. As he enters the harsh living conditions of this indigenous community, his social conscience forces him to confront his superiors, who threaten to destroy his material.

trailers.title: Película Cascabel (Escena con Raúl Ramírez y Rosita Bouchot)
